robot_capabilities.yahboom: A 4-wheel holonomic drive robot with a front RGB-D camera. It can clean floors.
robot_capabilities.burger: A 2-wheel differential drive robot with a front monocular camera. It can carry items
robot_capabilities.x_uav: A quadrotor UAV with a front-facing and a downward-facing RGB-D camera. It can see.

robot_morphology.yahboom: Payload: 5 kg, Speed: 0.6 m/s, Dimensions: 260 X 210 X 140 mm (L X W X H), Drive: 4-wheel holonomic
robot_morphology.burger: Payload: 2 kg, Speed: 0.22 m/s, Dimensions: 138 X 178 X 192 mm (L X W X H), Drive: 2-wheel differential
robot_morphology.x_uav: Payload: 1.5 kg, Speed: 0-3 m/s, Dimensions: 450 X 450 X 200 mm, Type: quadrotor UAV
